name: Sprint 2 — Exploitable Highs + Medium Sweep
goal: Close H-1 (rate limiting), H-2 (server-side library), H-3 (injection + output whitelist), H-4 (history guardrails), H-7 (user_email), and medium/low sweep M-1/M-3/M-4/M-9/M-10/L-1.

schemaDelta.note: No schema changes this sprint — all fixes were code-only.

notes: M-9 (settings upsert error check) was verified already closed in Sprint 1 — counted in findings closed for traceability. H-7 required DB schema column user_email on configurations table — playbook required. Rate limiter (H-1) is in-memory; upgrade path to Upstash Redis documented in lib/rateLimiter.js comment.
